ideation: This animation sequence represents the duality of Gemini, using both arms to create a mirrored, yet slightly offset, movement that symbolizes the sign's two-sided nature. The arms will move in a wave-like motion, starting with a mirroring effect and then diverging to show the independent yet connected aspects of Gemini.  Each arm will have a slightly different timing and amplitude to visually represent this contrast. This sequence will use 5 frames to capture the flow of motion.

frames.beat: arms mirror each other, rising slightly
arms rise higher, beginning to diverge with a twist
the left arm surges up, the right arm dips down
arms cross and twist, showing opposing forces
both arms fall to rest, duality resolved
